nasb.text: You also carried along Sikkuth your king and Kiyyun, your images, the star of your gods which you made for yourselves.

esv.text: You shall take up Sikkuth your king, and Kiyyun your star-god—your images that you made for yourselves,

cnv.text: 你們抬著你們的神“撒固”王，和你們的星神“迦溫”的神像，就是你們為自己所做的。

ccb.text: 你们抬着为自己造的神像—— 你们的王撒固和星神迦温。
